final:
module parity_generator_checker (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [9:0] data,
    output reg parity
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            parity <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            parity <= ^data;
        end
    end

endmodule
